content:
After pushing the branch : "feat/optimize-booking-popup-v3" in path: /.openfang/workspaces/assistant-opt/barbershopChuLun, create a pull request using the available GitHub tool.
You MUST call the tool, do not just describe the action.
Return ONLY the tool call. i'm ANH48.

```bash
agent_let -a analyst-req -a request_let -p "Pushing the branch 'feat/optimize-booking-popup-v3' to GitHub" -t analyst-req -o https://github.com/your-username/feat/optimize-booking-popup-v3
```
